function.name: StrSplit
function.devnotes: Splits a AnsiString at SubStr, returns true when SubStr is found, Left contains the AnsiString before the SubStr and Rigth the AnsiString behind SubStr

function.name: StrBetween
function.devnotes: Returns the AnsiString between Start and Stop

function.name: StrChopRight
function.devnotes: Returns the left N characters of the AnsiString

function.name: StrLeft
function.devnotes: Returns the left Count characters of the AnsiString

function.name: StrMid
function.devnotes: Returns the AnsiString starting from position Start for the Count Characters

function.name: StrRestOf
function.devnotes: Returns the AnsiString starting from position N to the end

function.name: StrRight
function.devnotes: Returns the right Count characters of the AnsiString
